summary: Iteration 166: P0 Regression + Faz 1 Telemetry Enhancement tests complete. Backend APIs working correctly (16/17 passed). Frontend telemetry page displays all required elements.

minor.issue: No dedicated GET single category endpoint - categories retrieved via list with filters

issues: Multiple hydration warnings in console (span in option, span in select, span in tbody) - but UI renders correctly

critical_code_review_comments: Console shows multiple i18n_missing_key warnings for menu items - consider adding Turkish translations
Hydration warnings for span elements in table/select - not critical but may indicate React SSR issue
seed_data_creation: Test categories created and deleted during tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Telemetry API and UI working correctly. SLO shows 'İhlali' (violation) when failure_rate exceeds target.

category_crud.create: PASS - POST creates category with sort_order required field
category_crud.update: PASS - PATCH updates category name without conflict

faz1_telemetry.slo_block: PASS - targets, current, status fields present
